SPEAKER_01: Okay, where do you stay? SPEAKER_00: I stay in Shadra. SPEAKER_01: Shadra? SPEAKER_01: So, are you comfortable in Noida? SPEAKER_01: Sector 62? SPEAKER_01: You will come? SPEAKER_00: I just want to ask, how much will be the price of everything? SPEAKER_01: Location-wise, the prices are different everywhere. SPEAKER_01: So, obviously, you will go where it is close to you. SPEAKER_01: Even if you go far away, you will get the same expense from the convent. SPEAKER_01: So, do you mainly want the idea of makeup or are you looking for a combined course in makeup? SPEAKER_00: I am looking for a course in hairstyle, makeup and everything else. SPEAKER_01: Makeup and hairstyling, beauty and facial threading and clean-up. SPEAKER_01: Then you can take cosmetology, cosmetology comes under 72-75 thousand and its 12 months installment is also made to pay. SPEAKER_01: So obviously paying 4-5 thousand per month is a little easy for everyone and admission is also only 7-8 thousand rupees. SPEAKER_01: So you can visit once and take a trial class and if you like it, then you can talk to your family and tell. SPEAKER_01: In that, bridal, party, engagement, haldi, mehendi, make-up, hairstyles, hair cutting, colouring, rebonding, beauty, facial, threading, de-climbing, everything. SPEAKER_01: So, it will be the same cosmetology certificate for 6 months. SPEAKER_01: It will be for 6 months. SPEAKER_01: Yes, it ends in 5-6 months. SPEAKER_01: If you think that you will come daily, but you will take classes in the morning and afternoon, then it may end in 3 months. SPEAKER_00: These children come in the morning or in the afternoon at the same time. SPEAKER_00: Can they pay the fees monthly? SPEAKER_01: Absolutely, you can. SPEAKER_01: If you think that I don't have to finance it. SPEAKER_01: One is a little easier in finance because I have to pay more than 4-5 kishtas for a 6-month course. SPEAKER_01: So according to that, 10,000 a month is required. SPEAKER_01: If that fee is giving me a time of up to 12 months, then definitely 5,000-5,000 is a little easier. SPEAKER_01: Whatever payment plan you want to take, you can talk to your family and tell them what you think is right. SPEAKER_00: So what will happen in this? SPEAKER_01: There are classes of salon management, so how is proper billing done in it? SPEAKER_01: What services should be paid at the time of service? SPEAKER_01: What kind of customized package is made according to the customer's choice? SPEAKER_01: Everything is taught, everything is practical. SPEAKER_01: But some girls go to the salon manager profile after completion of the course, so their starting salary is between 30,000 to 40,000. SPEAKER_00: So if you want to do a job, will you provide it? SPEAKER_00: It is from our side. SPEAKER_01: So you can visit, I will show you the makeup class and the hair class. SPEAKER_01: As you like it, you can talk to us at home and tell us. SPEAKER_01: We will start talking to the next week. SPEAKER_01: Thank you. SPEAKER_01: Welcome. SPEAKER_00: Thank you.
